contract_claim: L6-8: Module docstring contains PR-era language: 'It is **not** wired into `audit.py`'s live path in this PR — it is exercised by unit tests only'. The phrase 'in this PR' is a PR-submission artifact. Whether the adapter is now wired into audit.py's live path cannot be confirmed from this file alone.
observed_behavior: Update to describe current wiring status without PR-relative language, e.g. 'It is not currently wired into `audit.py`'s live path' or confirm and remove/update if it has since been integrated.
